questionHtml:
In the electrolysis apparatus shown, 0.59 g of Ni is deposited on the cathode of the first cell.

What is the mass of Ag deposited on the cathode of the second cell?


A.  0.54 g

B.  0.59 g

C.  1.08 g

D.  2.16 g

meta.title: In the electrolysis apparatus shown, 0.59 g of Ni is deposited on the cathode of the first cell. What is the mass of Ag deposited on the cathode of the second cell? A. 0.54 g B. 0.
